name: -Ham Cafe- Ohamu Shokudo Ki
short_description: [-Ham Cafe- Ohamu Shokudo Ki] is a diner management simulation.You manage a diner by collecting ingredients from farms and exploring, and developing dishes.Create delicious dishes to satisfy your customers and create your ideal diner.
detailed_description:
[-Ham Cafe- Ohamu Shokudo Ki] is a diner management simulation.

You manage a diner by collecting ingredients from farms and exploring, and developing dishes.

Create delicious dishes to satisfy your customers and create your ideal diner.

🐹 Game Features🥕

🔸 Gather ingredients and prepare food

Get ingredients from exploring and farming, develop dishes, and add them to the cafeteria menu. Add your favorite menu items.

🔸 Decide on the menu and manage the diner.

When you receive an order, quickly serve the food. Serve food at a fast pace and keep your customers satisfied.

🔸 Manage your farm & ranch

Grow vegetables in the fields and harvest by-products such as milk and eggs from animals. Obtain essential ingredients for your diner.

🔸 Rogue-like exploration

Explore the map in a simplified roguelike style, collecting ingredients through random events and battles with wild animals.

🔸 Dining room customization

Decorate the dining room to your liking by changing the furniture and interior design.

You are also free to do game commentary and video streaming.

We would appreciate it if you could include a link to your Steam store page in the video description.
